description: Record what the user said in reply to a question, closing it. Write the design nodes their answer implies separately — this is the record that it was settled, not a substitute for the design. Precondition: the gap must already have a recorded question (from gap_to_prompt's serve pass); answering one that was never asked is refused, not silently accepted — distinct from the withdraw_* tools, which no-op on an absent record.

answer.description: What the user said, in their own words.

gap_id.description: The gap the question was asked about (`gap_id` from `open_questions`).

name: answer_question
